installCommand: npm ci && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='apps/web/prisma';if(fs.existsSync(p+'/schema.postgresql.prisma')){fs.copyFileSync(p+'/schema.prisma',p+'/schema.sqlite.prisma');fs.copyFileSync(p+'/schema.postgresql.prisma',p+'/schema.prisma');}" && npm --workspace @mealkey/web run prisma:generate && npm --workspace @mealkey/web exec -- prisma migrate deploy
